title: corylus yezoensis
intro: Corylus yezoensis, also known as Japanese hazelnut or Yezo hazelnut, is a species of flowering plant in the family Betulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as diarrhea, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Corylus yezoensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by drying the leaves and nuts, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
